text: [S_0] ("2026-01-01", "Patient admitted, arrives at Emergency Department for persistent fever and cough with sputum.", 0.0, 1.0) | [S_1] ("2026-01-01", "Patient alert, oriented and cooperative, clear airways.", 0.0, 0.1) | [S_2] ("2026-01-01", "eupnoeic on room air, normal chest expansion, no use of accessory muscles.", 0.0, 0.1) | [S_3] ("2026-01-01", "Skin dry, normal temperature, normal color.", 0.0, 0.1) | [S_4] ("2026-01-01", "Radial pulses present, rhythmic and tachycardic.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_5] ("2026-01-01", "GCS 15, free and fluent speech, no deficit in the 4 limbs, no unilateral motor and sensory deficit.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_6] ("2026-01-01", "Pupils equal, round, and reactive to light.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_7] ("2026-01-01", "38.2. pos cvp 18G right upper limb, Blood tests + blood cultures performed.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_8] ("2026-01-01", "Sample collected for sputum.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_9] ("2026-01-01", "Administered paracetamol 1g IV.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_10] ("2026-01-01", "R/chest X-ray", 0.0, 0.5)
